recentTweets.text: RT @AFPTN: Congress has voted 308:117 to make Daylight Savings Time permanent. If approved by the Senate we can stop changing the clocks 2X…

Great meeting with the @TNFFAFoundation officers today! They lead over 31,000 members across our great state. It is incredibly encouraging to see the future of agriculture is in the hands of these bright and hardworking young folks. https://t.co/6Yga1wcpQ3

Today, I am overseeing debate on H.R. 1181 Protecting Privacy in Purchases Act and H.R. 139 the Sunshine Protection Act.

Watch here: https://t.co/CLIpeq3bet https://t.co/k2ZxVr5T81

Two years ago an assassination attempt was made on Trump’s life. In a moment of terror, he let the American people know he was unafraid.

May we never forget that no matter our policy differences we are all Americans and political violence will never be tolerated in this country. https://t.co/okeKVlsL8r

250 years ago today, our founding father’s had the courage to come together and declare the United States’ independence. They knew an uphill battle awaited them, but believed so strongly in establishing a country built on freedom that the risk would be worth the reward. https://t.co/zQJH4UsKIe

This is a victorious day for women, girls, and our daughters across the US! It is sad that it took a SCOTUS ruling for biological males to be banned from women’s sports. I am glad to see the sanctity of women’s sports will be protected for year’s to come. https://t.co/Mp87aAQnBN

Today, we honored the role that @AEDCnews has played in ensuring the security of our Nation for 75 years. 

This year America celebrates 250 years as a country.  This would not be possible without the men and women who work at AEDC to defend and deter threats to our homeland. https://t.co/stGWuevYCp

“I find it fascinating people from all these countries are coming here saying ‘we’re being told how terrible things are in America and how dysfunctional it is.’ And they’re just loving us. They’re going crazy over the food, the people, Buc-ee’s.”

Listen here @WGNSRadio 👇 https://t.co/eyEHAyRUhH

Happy Father’s Day to all of the dads, uncles, granddads, and father figures in #TN04! Thank you for all you do to raise up the next generation with strength and a solid work ethic. I hope you spend the day feeling loved and celebrated! https://t.co/XyrM6IfWq9

Please join Amy and I in praying for the friends and family members of the 8 crew members in yesterday’s B-52 Bomber crash at Edwards Air Force Base in California.
https://t.co/70YzBNPldx
Congratulations to @narendramodi on becoming India’s longest-serving elected Prime Minister. His leadership has helped strengthen ties between the US and India.

Tonight, the House passed S. 2, the Secure America Act, to fund DHS, ICE, and CBP, through the remainder of Trump’s term. 

I am proud to have voted YES. @HouseGOP are fulfilling our promise to keep our border secure and put the safety and security of US citizens first.

“It was such a relief to actually have a Secretary of USDA come in with statistics and not just excuses.” 

Had the opportunity to talk with @DanMandisShow about my questioning of Secretary Rollins during last week’s @HouseAgGOP hearing.

Listen here 👇 https://t.co/2WVWvXD0s5

PVT. Cleo Martin was a Tennessean who died July 4, 1944, after surviving D-Day but was killed in the fighting that followed. I had the privilege of attending a wreath ceremony where almost 9,400 Americans are buried in Normandy. I heard many stories of bravery from our troops. https://t.co/ipSUbaUZDg

From day one of Secretary Rollins assuming her post, she has worked to root out waste, fraud and abuse in the SNAP program. Today, she came before @HouseAgGOP with answers to questions I repeatedly asked the Biden Administration for years. 

Watch ⬇️ https://t.co/pcygy0x0eg

Happy Birthday, Tennessee! 230 years of the being the greatest state in our Nation. We are lucky to call the Volunteer State home!
https://t.co/i1FmkzKJRO

Trump Accounts are helping families invest early in the child’s future. Parents can now manage the accounts directly through this new app. 

Eligible children start with a $1,000 contribution from the U.S. Treasury and families can contribute up to $5,000 annually.

Today, we honor the memory of the brave men and women in our military who gave their life in defense of our freedom. 

May all of our Gold Star families know that our Nation owes them a great debt of gratitude for their service and sacrifice. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/IYwHWockqF

Enjoyed getting to see the Lawrence County Chamber of Commerce during their DC fly-in! It was great meet with local officials and many of their business leaders and stakeholders. These folks are doing great work to strengthen their local economy! https://t.co/M9eEgAcnld

The @DoleFoundation works to support caregivers of our country’s military members and veterans. I was glad to meet with some of their members today to learn how we can better advocate for those who care for our Nation’s heroes. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/mddwuWyoX7

Yesterday, I questioned DOW officials in the @HASCRepublicans Seapower and Projection Forces subcommittee hearing for the FY27 Navy budget request.

Watch 👇 https://t.co/ypiJ0oHOmZ

I’m overseeing debate on the Stopping Indoctrination and Protecting Kids Act.

This bill stops public schools from keeping critical information from parents & stops these institutions from pushing radical gender ideology on our children.

Watch live here: https://t.co/CwVak7eohQ https://t.co/Zz5Tn438Am

In today’s @HASCRepublicans Air Force FY27 budget request hearing I had to opportunity to ask questions to Secretary Meink, General Wilsbach, and General Saltzman. Space defense is one of my top priorities to make sure America is leading in.

Watch here ⬇️ https://t.co/5lWZYG35DA

Great to have the American Quarter Horse Association join me in the office—including a Murfreesboro native! It’s always great to see young folks getting involved with the agriculture community. https://t.co/iMqawqfrhd

I questioned Department of War officials this morning during our @HASCRepublicans posture hearing on National Security concerns in the Greater Middle East and Africa.

Watch here ⬇️ https://t.co/1CAPNhqCG1

Great conversation with @mattmurphyshow on @997wtn about China, the rise of AI and quantum computing in defense, and more.

Listen here 👇 https://t.co/RZFxdgHqjG

Yesterday, I had the opportunity to talk with @WzyxRadio and walk through the process my office took to working with Secretary Collins to keep the McMinnville VA Clinic open. 

Listen here 👇 https://t.co/NGz6Bg96wm

🚨MCMINNVILLE VA WILL REMAIN OPEN THROUGH 2026🚨

Read my statement ⬇️ https://t.co/Dfe4V75FTp

I had the opportunity to question Navy Department of War officials during this morning’s @HASCRepublicans hearing. 

Acting Navy Secretary Cao emphasized the importance of energizing our American defense ship building industrial base. 

Watch here 👇 https://t.co/klnnhwsIQz

Tennessee State Forester Heather Slayton came by for a meeting to discuss our state priorities in the Farm Bill and how we can continue to collaborate as federal and state partners. Thank you for all the work you do for @TNAgriculture! https://t.co/JqybKjvwok

This week we honor the sacrifice law enforcement officers and their families make during National Police Week. 

These brave men and women run towards danger to serve and protect their communities. Make sure to thank an officer this week and let us pray for the loved ones of https://t.co/pwjGqKDK3P

It’s National Small Business Week! Local business owners create quality good paying jobs for their local community members and are the backbone of our economy. 

Thank you to all who put in the hard work every single day to better our communities and grow our economy!🇺🇸 https://t.co/385YISmqac

I am proud to say the Farm, Food, and National Security Act of 2026 has passed the House! 🚜🐄🌽

A new Farm Bill was long overdue. I am grateful for all of the input farmers and ranchers across TN-04 gave over the course of the last few months!

My full statement 👇 https://t.co/3MzrjU9UwB
RT @TNFarmBureau: We are thrilled the U.S. House of Representatives has finally passed a 5-year, bipartisan and modernized farm bill that p…

Fellow Tennessean, @SecWar is appearing before the @HASCRepublicans today for a hearing.

I thanked him for his commitment to restarting production on the MQ-9 Reaper Drone, which has been flown on successful missions by the TN Air National Guard 118th Wing.

Watch ⬇️ https://t.co/g9jvs8UFTd

Great to have the Tennessee Beverage Association in the office last week. We discussed #MAHA and ingredient safety and my work on this year’s Farm Bill—which heads to the floor for a vote this week!🥤 https://t.co/vC4V5RovMV

I am grateful tonight that President Trump, Vice President Vance, and everyone in attendance at the White House Correspondents Dinner is safe. The shooter is no longer a threat. 

The Senate must return to Washington immediately and act expeditiously to FULLY FUND DHS. https://t.co/VLV5JVI5Sf

The @tnhospitals stopped by the office this week to provide an update on the needs of hospitals in #TN04 and across the state. I’m grateful for all of our healthcare heroes and the job they do to save lives and their proactive approach to keeping our constituents in good health. https://t.co/vXIH4I1iZO

The @HASCRepublicans Strategic Forces subcommittee met yesterday to review FY 27 budget requests for nuclear forces & atomic energy defense activities. 

In Tennessee, we are lucky to have strong leaders like @ORNL & @TVAnews in the nuclear industry.

Watch my questioning here👇 https://t.co/eiy5xzDSni

Last night the House paid tribute to my colleague, Rep. Scott, who passed away yesterday. 

I served with David on the House Ag Committee where he rose to chair & ranking member. He cared deeply about serving the state of Georgia and the agricultural community. He will be missed. https://t.co/E5YredGHZL
Today, I oversaw a vote series to overturn costly Green New Deal policies and cut through bureaucratic red tape. https://t.co/vFPxhMlZKU

“How can this committee work to ensure we have space dominance in light of our adversaries China, Russia, and North Korea developing counter-space capabilities?”

Watch my questioning of Department of War Officials during today’s @HASCRepublicans hearing 👇 https://t.co/xZS14GRFYp

Happy to have the @TennesseeCattle  in the office today to discuss the important role that local ranchers play in securing our food supply chain! I’m thankful for their advocacy on behalf of the beef industry in our great state. 🐄🥩 https://t.co/2dYFwW4s3b

Great meeting with the Arnold Community Council today! These individuals are some of our strongest advocates for making sure those employed at @AEDCnews have all the support they need to continue to do the work to protect and defend our great Nation. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/J5AQVwEM1Q

Glad to have the Tennessee Pork Producers Association in the office yesterday! We had a great discussion about my work on the Farm Bill and I thanked them for all they do to keep our food supply chain secure. Food security is National security! 🐖 https://t.co/7emqw84MFg

Watch my opening statement during today’s @HASCRepublicans Strategic Forces Subcommittee hearing on DoW missile defense and defeat programs.

I recognized General Gainey and General Guillot for nearly 40 years of service to our country and wished Gainey well in retirement. https://t.co/jgvY7voZPE

Today, April 15th, is the deadline to file your federal income tax return. Thanks to the #OBBB passed last year, Tennessee families will see an average tax cut of $3,817! 

@HouseGOP delivered on our promise to put more money back in the pockets of hardworking taxpayers! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/PE3kMWAIav

🌊 SPLASH DOWN 🌊

Artemis II is safely home. 🚀

America remains the world leader of space exploration. Thank you again to all of the many constituents in #TN04 for your contributions to making this mission a success! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/sVB0RAmedD

On National Former Prisoner of War Recognition Day, we honor and remember our American heroes who endured captivity in the fight for our country’s freedom. May we never forget that our freedom is because of the sacrifice of those who answer the call to serve in our military. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/PdPl5WZpDz

On National Former Prisoner of War Recognition Day, we honor and remember our American heroes who endured captivity in the fight for our country’s freedom. 

May we never forget that our freedom is because of the sacrifice of those who answer the call to serve in our military. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/M86SvtsEu2

House Republicans are delivering results for American small business owners through the Working Families Tax Cuts Act. 

Lessening their tax burden and cutting through bureaucratic red tape allows them to grow their businesses and create more jobs! https://t.co/Ku0cOxGEWc

🚨ARTEMIS II HAS LAUNCHED 🚀

I am incredibly proud to know countless Tennesseans from #TN04 made this day possible. Whether working for NASA, a contractor, or a supplier, your expertise helped make history today! https://t.co/fdWFOKxzpv

Proud to have received a 100% Heritage Action Score this legislative session! 

I will continue to work to advance the conservative agenda on behalf of Tennessee’s Fourth Congressional District! 🇺🇸

https://t.co/4gUjYldTGN

Lumber Liquidators is relocating its HQ to Lawrenceburg, TN—creating 76 jobs! 

From pro-growth economic policies, commitment to workforce readiness, and family friendly communities, Tennessee is a top choice for businesses across the Nation to call home. https://t.co/BS5hPDCIKb

I was honored to meet with EMS personnel from TN last week. 

These heroes have are responsible for saving countless lives and providing comfort to those who are experiencing some of life’s toughest moments. 

I am incredibly grateful for our first responders. https://t.co/gLU4i8NAs8

I am overseeing debate on an amendment to fix the Senate’s legislation, which is a non-starter for DHS funding. Senate Democrats have made it clear that their priorities lie in reopening the border and halting the deportation of illegal aliens, not protecting the American people. https://t.co/RAOc7aVFgg

Please keep the entire Montgomery County community in your thoughts and prayers tonight. Two middle school students were killed in a bus crash on a field trip. May God comfort these families, students, & teachers as they walk through the days ahead. https://t.co/JN0vQK81cA

Great to be with Tennessee members of the Commercial Vehicle Training Association! 

I appreciate all of their hard work to advocate for truck driver training programs. Trucking plays an integral part in securing our supply chain! 🚚 https://t.co/OVv0AE2d9o

"As we have seen recently in Iran, space has become instrumental to every conflict with both space effects and support to the joint force.”

My opening statement during yesterday’s @HASCRepublicans Strategic Forces Subcommittee hearing on national security space programs ⬇️ https://t.co/ysARX3bitI

Today, we honor the 3,533 Medal of Honor recipients who have sacrificially served our country with bravery and integrity. 

May God bless these heroes and their families. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/0JKk6moOKL

In Tennessee, we are lucky to have strong leaders like @ORNL & @TVAnews in the nuclear industry.

Watch my questioning here👇 https://t.co/eiy5xzDSni

Please join Amy and me in praying for the service members onboard the KC-135 tanker that crashed in Iraq. 

“According to CENTCOM, the incident was “not due to hostile or friendly fire” 
https://t.co/d7FYFBVoJs

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 2 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Scott DesJarlais. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Iraq / Baghdad / Kirkuk, Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-04-23T16:29:35Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
assessment.dominantFrame: Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language
